title: Woman Pleads Guilty in 2025 Charlotte Murder Case
summary: Rebecca Oxendine pleads guilty to manslaughter in the 2025 north Charlotte murder, facing up to 17 years in prison.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the consequences of violent crime and the legal system's response in the Charlotte community.

title: Guilty Plea Entered in 2024 Northeast Charlotte Homicide
summary: Reginald Anthony pleads guilty in a 2024 homicide case that occurred in northeast Charlotte when he was 17.
charlotte_impact: Addresses juvenile crime and its impact on the community, emphasizing the need for intervention.

title: Motorcyclist Seriously Injured in Troutman Crash
summary: A motorcyclist sustained serious injuries in a crash along Charlotte Highway near Interstate 77 in Troutman.

title: Teen Pleads Guilty to Deadly 2024 Shooting
summary: A teenager pleads guilty to a deadly shooting that occurred in 2024 along Tom Hunter Road in northeast Charlotte.

title: TB Exposure Investigated at Fort Mill Middle School

summary: Charlotte City Council cancels a special meeting to revisit the I-77 South Express Lanes project amid political pressure and public debate.

title: Father Charged with Murder of 8-Month-Old Baby
summary: Nieves Alexander Acosta-Maldonado is charged with the murder of his 8-month-old baby, confessing to shaking him until he stopped crying.

summary: Charlotte Water implements mandatory water restrictions on May 15 due to a severe drought, limiting water usage and urging conservation.

summary: Food prices are increasing, particularly for beef, coffee, and fresh produce, due to the Iran conflict and rising fuel costs.

title: Fatal Crash in Southwest Charlotte
summary: Two people are dead and one injured in a southwest Charlotte crash. Westinghouse Boulevard at South Tryon is closed for investigation.

title: NC Lawmakers Consider Bill to Curb Vaping Sales to Minors
summary: House Bill 430 aims to raise the legal age to purchase tobacco and nicotine products from 18 to 21, aligning with federal law.

title: NAACP Warns Against Appointing Non-Black Interim Mayor
summary: NAACP Charlotte president warns against appointing a non-Black interim mayor, urging accountability amid debates over racial representation.

title: 'Cabo 6' Member Seeks Dismissal of Wrongful Death Suit
summary: A member of the 'Cabo 6' seeks dismissal of a wrongful death lawsuit in Shanquella Robinson's death, denying allegations of attacking her.
